data.title: Implementing CADR Requirements for NIH Websites: A Case Study
data.description: Today, on April 6, 2026, Information Management Services, Inc. (IMS) unveiled its latest white paper titled "Implementing CADR Requirements for NIH Websites: A Case Study." This publication serves as a guide for organizations to adhere to the National Institutes of Health (NIH) standards, focusing on Comprehensive Accessible Data Repository (CADR) implementation. The white paper offers a strategic framework to aid in compliance, aiming to assist organizations in meeting the requirements set by the NIH.

data.title: Natural gas shortages drive resurgence in nuclear power, as Asian nations reconsider following Fukushima; accelerating industry shift.
data.description: Recent disruptions in natural gas supplies have prompted countries across Asia and other regions to reconsider their aversion to nuclear power following the 2011 Fukushima incident. This change in attitude is reflected in the rising number of countries considering investments in nuclear energy as a more reliable and stable alternative.

data.title: UPSHER-SMITH LAUNCHES GENERIC VERSION OF CIPRODEX® (CIPROFLOXACIN 0.3% AND DEXAMETHASONE 0.1%) STERILE OTIC SUSPENSION
data.description: A new ear drop suspension prescription has been introduced as part of Upsher-Smith Laboratories, LLC's diversification strategy in Maple Grove, Minnesota. The company, a subsidiary of Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. listed as 6472.TW and BORAY.OTCQX, revealed the release on April 6, 2026.

data.title: CPS Announces Credit Facility Capacity Increase
data.description: In Las Vegas, Nevada on April 6, 2026, Consumer Portfolio Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: CPSS) revealed that they have made changes to their two-year revolving credit agreement with Capital One, N.A. The adjustment involves raising the capacity of the facility, and impacts both Capital One, N.A. and the subordinate lender. The facility's capacity has been upped significantly, jumping from $167.5 million to $390 million as part of the amendment announced on April 3, 2026.

data.title: Boston Society for Architecture Executive Director Danyson Tavares Named to Boston Business Journal's 2026 40 Under 40 List
data.description: In Boston on April 6, 2026, the Boston Society for Architecture made known that Danyson Tavares, the Executive Director, has been selected for the Boston Business Journal's 40 Under 40 list for 2026. This list highlights the top young leaders in the area who are making significant impacts.

data.title: Georgia Power continues focus on improving reliability through Grid Investment Program
data.description: In 2025, a company successfully finished more than 100 grid projects and significant system upgrades across Georgia. The progress has been crucial for ensuring dependable and cost-effective energy access to fuel economic development in the state. Georgia Power's efforts in bolstering and improving the power grid have played a vital role in supporting this initiative in Atlanta.

data.title: Deckorators® Signs Agreement to Acquire Expanded Manufacturing Capabilities, Accelerating Innovation in Outdoor Living
data.description: Deckorators®, a prominent brand in the outdoor living sector and a division of UFP Industries, revealed on April 6, 2026, that they have completed the acquisition of the remaining operating assets of MoistureShield decking. MoistureShield, a well-regarded brand in the decking and outdoor living industry, is now under the ownership of Deckorators®. This acquisition signifies a significant move in the market, consolidating two leading players in the industry. The deal is expected to have a notable impact on the outdoor living sector with combined assets and expertise. The financial details of the acquisition have not been disclosed at this time.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Cutting Tool for Plastic Nail Tips (CNH-6036)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 6, 2026, an inventor from Roosevelt, Utah shared the inspiration behind the creation of the FIE'S MULTI SHAPE TIP CUTTER. The inventor aimed to streamline the process of cutting plastic nail tips to preferred shapes and lengths. The innovative design is intended to enhance precision and minimize manual effort.

data.title: PDS Health Medical Names Brett Bingham President
data.description: Appointment of Brett Bingham, MHA, as president of PDS Health marks a key development for the organization as it progresses in advancing integrated dental and medical care. PDS Health®, a prominent integrated healthcare support organization based in Henderson, Nevada, disclosed the appointment on April 6, 2026. This move is significant as the company enters the next phase of growth, solidifying its position in the healthcare sector.
